title: Magnetic Stirrer 3000rpm, Magnetic stir Plate with Stir Bar, Mini Magnetic Mixer Stirrer Max Stirring Capacity 3000mL, Lab Stirrers (No Heating)
description:
Powerful：Mini Magnetic with stepless speed regulation 350-3000RPM and max stirring quantity 3000ML
Easy Use：Magnetic stirrer with compact design, easy to operate, 12v voltage for mobile use, maximum speed 3000RPM, please use our dedicated power plug, otherwise it may affect the machine speed
High Lab Quality Material：Magnetic Stirrer Maintenance-free brushless DC motor enable stable and strength operation，Frosted countertop are wear-resistant, corrosion-resistant and easy to clean.
Portable For Wide Use：Perfect for stirring in scientific research, industry, agriculture, health and medicine, homebrew, like brew yeast starters,wine making,Juice mixing and etc
Notice For Use: Please use a beaker or a container with a flat and thin bottom. Put the stir bar into the container first, and then slowly turn the knob to keep the stir bar synchronized with the magnetic field, so as to obtain the best use effect.Please note there's no beakers in our package.
reviews_5s:
The WEST TUNE Magnetic Stirrer 3000rpm is a game-changer for anyone in need of efficient mixing solutions. As a researcher in a busy laboratory setting, this stirrer has become an indispensable tool in my daily workflow.

First and foremost, the speed and efficiency of this stirrer are truly impressive. With a maximum stirring speed of 3000rpm, it effortlessly mixes even the most viscous solutions with ease. Whether I'm working with chemicals, reagents, or biological samples, I can always rely on this stirrer to deliver consistent and uniform mixing results.

The magnetic coupling technology ensures smooth and silent operation, minimizing noise and vibration during use. This not only creates a more comfortable working environment but also helps maintain the integrity of delicate samples.

I also appreciate the compact and space-saving design of this stirrer. It doesn't take up much room on my lab bench, yet it's sturdy and stable during operation. Plus, the easy-to-use controls allow for precise speed adjustments, giving me complete control over the mixing process.

Another standout feature of this stirrer is its durability and reliability. Constructed from high-quality materials and featuring a robust design, it's built to withstand the rigors of daily use in a laboratory setting. I can trust that it will perform flawlessly day in and day out, without any issues.The WEST TUNE Magnetic Stirrer, boasting a speed of 3000rpm and including a stir bar, has proven to be an efficient and reliable tool for my mixing needs.

One of the standout features of this magnetic stir plate is its powerful and consistent stirring capability. The 3000rpm speed ensures thorough mixing of liquids, making it ideal for various laboratory and home applications.

The inclusion of a stir bar adds convenience, eliminating the need to purchase additional accessories. The stirrer's compact size makes it suitable for smaller spaces while still delivering reliable performance.

I've used the WEST TUNE Magnetic Stirrer for a range of tasks, from blending solutions in chemistry experiments to mixing ingredients in culinary preparations. In each instance, it has performed admirably, delivering consistent results.

Overall, I highly recommend the WEST TUNE Magnetic Stirrer to anyone in need of a versatile and efficient mixing solution. Its 5-star rating is well-deserved for its performance, ease of use, and reliability.Finally, a simple, well designed, stir plate, that actually works!

I like everything about this plate, the size is perfect, doesn't take up much space, control knob is solid, and the best part, it doesn't seem to hang up the magnets like so many do, and it's powerful. And all at a great price! If I had to nitpick, I'd prefer a power cord to the USB cord, as everyone has so darn many of those stupid things lying around already.

I returned the $170 Northern Brewing Maelstrom plate, as it just didn't work very well. This one works MUCH better at a fraction of the price. For the 5 gallon home brewer, this is all you'll ever need.This magnetic stir plate is a game-changer for my resin work! The plate is sturdy and well-made, with a powerful magnet that ensures efficient stirring of my solutions. The speed control is precise, allowing me to adjust the stirring speed to suit my needs. The included stir bar is of high quality and works perfectly with the plate. I also appreciate the compact size of the plate, which makes it easy to store when not in use. If you're looking for a reliable and efficient stir plate for your work, I highly recommend this product!This item arrived quickly and works great. I needed something I can use when at events that didn't need to be plugged in and it works perfectly. It is easy to charge and is user friendly. I am pleased and will definitely buy more! Thank you for the great transaction!It's a simple device but it does its work without any issuesI was a bit skeptical with the plastic housing, but I consistently use a 3 liter beaker filled to the top and it works great. Also sometimes I leave it on for days at a time without issue.Got it for a home science project for the kids. Was cool👍🏾I'm very surprise how well made it is. I bought the intllab before and this one feels and run betters.It works.
reviews_1s: If you’re looking for a cheap stirrer this is NOT the one for you. I ran this product for about 4 minutes, in a typical room temperature environment then set it aside for later. When I returned after a fee hours to use it again it would not turn on no matter what I did. There are no loose connections in the wiring it just simply doesn’t work, my guess a faulty motor or adjuster.Broken item, had to returnThe magnetic stir is not strong enough to be used in an Erlenmeyer flask which is the whole point of having it. I need a refund or something this thing is absolute junk.Filled out contact info on Westtune site explaining about product not working at all. Have waited for a response for over a week. Couldn't return because didn't get to use until after deadline for return had expired. Guess you only get what you pay for.What else to say other than the title. Just need to add some length here. It Worked once and never again. so I know it can work and it’s not some other issue.This device does not work well at all. The magnet is too weak to successfully mix anything in the Erlenmeyer flask. I need to return this useless device.
